prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/211/双一流高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第15名持续上升至2025年第11名、2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要因杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论关注，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度为较热(总排名第56)，国防七子标签持续吸引关注。历史投档异常记录中未见北航断档信号；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、仪器科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+等16个A-/A/A+学科，工科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、人工智能等北航核心专业大类持续高热推荐；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年(约39.12万)小幅增长约0.6%，物理类考生估算约25.6万(占比约65%)，较2025年(24.98万)增加约2.5%，竞争基数略有扩大。省控线(物理类本科批)2025年为426分，近年波动不大；北航位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在湖北无特殊地域偏好；2021–2025年湖北招生人数占该校全国总招生比例未在汇总文件中单独列出，但物理类计划稳定在125–176人区间，属该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1446、2026年扩招12%(位次数字增大方向)、软科排名持续上升(吸引高分考生，位次数字减小方向)、声誉负面轻微抑制、考生总数小幅增长等因素，扩招效应占主导但被排名上升部分抵消；预测2026年物理类最低位次约1580名，区间1380–1780名。

- 工科试验班类（未来空天领军计划）
- 微电子科学与工程（卓越人才培养试验班）。

二档（中等）
- 工科试验班类（信息科学与技术类，含微电子、自动化、机器人工程）
- 工科试验班类（航空航天类）
- 理科试验班类（含信息与计算科学、数学与应用数学、应用物理学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1580名，区间1380–1780。位次在区间下限(1380名)以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业(计算机类、未来空天领军计划)；位次在区间中段(1500–1650)建议以二档为主(信息类、航空航天类)，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限(1780名)附近建议以三档保底为主，二档作为主攻方向。北航工科实力极强，各专业就业前景普遍优秀。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1485 → 1464 → 1310 → 4710 (abnormal in 2024 due to major group split) → 1446. Excluding the 2024 anomaly, the ranking has been stable in the 1310–1485 range in recent three years, with a 2025 baseline of about 1446. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 176 in 2021 → 127 in 2022 → 125 in 2023 → 125 in 2024 → 125 in 2025. In 2026 (Section 7), the plan is 140, an increase of 15 students (+12%) compared to 2025, representing a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985/211/Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2025 and 11th in 2026, firmly among the top engineering institutions nationwide. In the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to the Yang Yun incident of moral misconduct and academic fraud, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall rank 56), with the 'National Defense Seven Sons' label continuing to attract attention. No signs of admission cutoff anomalies for Beihang in historical records. It has 16 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A+, and Materials Science and Engineering A+, with extremely outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beihang such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Artificial Intelligence remain highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of Hubei Gaokao examinees is approximately 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025 (about 391,200). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 256,000 (accounting for about 65%), an increase of about 2.5% from 2025 (249,800), slightly expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) was 426 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Beihang is located in Beijing, a top national university, with no special regional preference in Hubei. From 2021 to 2025, the proportion of Hubei enrollment to the university's total national enrollment is not separately listed in the summary file, but the Physics Category plan is stable in the 125–176 range, making Hubei one of its important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1446, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12% (ranking number increasing direction), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (attracting high-scoring candidates, ranking number decreasing direction), slight suppression from negative reputation, and a small increase in total examinees, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by the ranking rise. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 1580, with a range of 1380–1780.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science, including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology, including Microelectronics, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Astronautics)
- Science Experimental Class (including Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class, Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Quantum Technology Pioneer Program)
- Physics (Top-Notch Student Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1580, range 1380–1780. Candidates with ranking within the lower bound (1380) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Future Aerospace Leading Program); those in the middle range (1500–1650) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Information, Aerospace and Astronautics), while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper bound (1780) are advised to mainly secure Tier 3 as a backup, with Tier 2 as the primary direction. Beihang has extremely strong engineering strength, and all majors generally have excellent employment prospects.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category decreased from approximately 888 to 957 to 951 to 816 to 696, showing a continuous downward trend (smaller ranking number indicates increased competition), with a cumulative decrease of about 192 places over the past 5 years, and a baseline of approximately 696 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021 → 9 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 10 in 2024 → 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan (§7) is 6, unchanged from 2025, with a very small enrollment size (only 6), making rankings susceptible to fluctuations from individual candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 11th nationally, with strong comprehensive strength, and brand appeal to liberal arts candidates as well; the 2026 reputation evaluation is notably negative (Yang Yun incident), but mainly involves science and engineering fields, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity is high, and the 'Defense Seven Sons' label boosts overall attention; Foreign Languages and Literature is A (fifth round), and the Social Science Pilot Class covers law, administrative management, economics, etc., with moderate relevance to Beihang's advantageous disciplines, but the 985 platform itself is attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category only offers the Social Science Pilot Class (law/administrative management/economics) and the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Pilot Class, with limited major choices; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province for 2026 is about 137,000 (approximately 35% of total), a slight decrease of about 3% from 2025 (141,400), with a small reduction in the competition base. The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) was 442 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years; Beihang is located in Beijing, with very few History Category enrollments, which are nationwide, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in recent rankings (increased competition), the unchanged 2026 plan, a slight decrease in History Category candidates, and the sustained appeal of Beihang's 985 brand, the downward trend is expected to continue but with a narrowing margin; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 676, with a range of 476–876.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Pilot Class (Law, Administrative Management, Economics; includes AI-Administrative Management, Law-AI dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (Beihang only offers the above two majors in History Category in Hubei, with no medium-difficulty majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Pilot Class (Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Talent Training Pilot Class, English, Translation; includes English-AI, Translation-AI, English-Finance dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang only enrolls 6 students (2 majors) in History Category in Hubei, with large ranking fluctuations. The predicted ranking is about 676, with a range of 476–876. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (476) can aim for Tier 1 (Law/Administrative Management/Economics direction); those in the middle of the range are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety; those near the upper limit of the range (876) need to be cautious and consider other university choices. Both majors include AI dual degree programs, with distinctive interdisciplinary training features.
